g.text: # your fleet — two agents you already run, tagged once with flotilla
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the t
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the te
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the tes
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test s
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test su
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test sui
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suit
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite a
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite an
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and r
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and re
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and rep
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and repo
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and repor
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report b
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report ba
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report bac
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report back
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report back"
flotilla send --from xo backend "run the test suite and report back"
delivered to backend (pane fdemo:0.0) — turn confirmed
# not fire-and-forget — flotilla confirmed the backend desk actually started a turn
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 p
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 pa
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 pas
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 pass
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 passi
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 passin
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 passing
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 passing"
flotilla send --from backend xo "all green — 142 passing"
delivered to xo (pane fdemo:0.1) — turn confirmed
# the xo collected the report — every hop is a confirmed delivery, never a silent drop
flotilla watch: clock running — XO=xo interval=20m0s ack=./xo-alive
flotilla watch: clock-only (relay disabled — set channel_id + bot token + operator_user_id to enable)
# the xo now advances authorized work on a clock — an idle fleet costs nothing
